walkthroughs.visit_note: Damp survey of an older commercial building. The ground-floor rear wall by the drainpipes smells musty and has dark staining spreading up from the base - is that active damp or just surface dirt? One flood-affected room has dark growth covering most of the walls - how urgent is remediation? A corridor wall is shedding paint in large sheets. The painted entrance pillar also has a few small blisters - cosmetic, or an early moisture sign?

photos.note: rear wall by the drainpipes, musty smell

walkthroughs.visit_note: Exterior structural check after a purchase inquiry. A low garden wall shows rusted reinforcement mesh with the concrete cover coming off - how far gone is it? The old boundary brick wall has a wide crack running right through it - is it stable? Inside the arched passage there is a long stepped crack from the brickwork down into the stone - does that need a structural engineer? Around one window the render has fallen away and there is green growth along the base of the wall.
